examples: Do you believe in a life hereafter?
Michel Foucault (1972), The Archaeology of Knowledge; hereafter this text will be abbreviated as AK.
I hope this will be a lesson to you hereafter, to put your things away when you finish.
You know, there may be some tactical linkages that form hereafter, but I think we shouldn't exaggerate that potential.
Hereafter there will be no more work with us on Saturdays and Sundays.
